title: Filipino Peppery Chicken Breast
description: A twist on traditional chicken breast with a flavorful peppery Filipino-inspired sauce. Perfect for a quick and easy dinner.
instructions: Season the chicken breast with salt and black pepper.
Heat oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the chicken breast until browned on both sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the chicken to a baking dish and bake for 15-20 minutes or until cooked through.
While the chicken cooks, heat the oil in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and chopped onion and sauté until fragrant, about 1-2 minutes.
Add the soy sauce, fish sauce, brown sugar, and black pepper to the saucepan.
Bring the sauce to a simmer and cook until thickened, about 2-3 minutes.
Serve the chicken breast with the peppery Filipino-inspired sauce spooned over the top.
